data.title: Coinbase's Chief Legal Officer says clarity on stablecoin yield deal is imminent, despite concerns about deposit flight.
data.description: The chief legal officer of a major cryptocurrency exchange refuted worries from the banking sector regarding the potential flight of deposits. This comes as legislators are in the process of finalizing regulations related to stablecoins. The exchange's lawyer addressed these concerns, emphasizing the need for regulatory clarity and highlighting the importance of stablecoin provisions in the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: Carolinas AGC Announces Inaugural Excellence in Human Resources Leadership Awards
data.description: The inaugural Excellence in Human Resources Leadership Award Winners have been announced by Carolinas AGC (CAGC) in Charlotte, N.C., on April 2, 2026. This award recognizes CAGC members who have shown outstanding leadership in Human Resources. The winners have been selected based on their exemplary contributions to the field. This initiative aims to celebrate and honor the achievements of individuals in the Human Resources sector.

data.title: Health Coach Institute Launches Functional Nutrition Professional Certification to Elevate Standards in Wellness Education
data.description: A recently accredited program by AADP has been introduced to Phoenix, aiming to enhance structured assessment, systems-based reasoning, and scope clarity in nutrition training. With chronic diseases currently responsible for 90% of the nation's annual healthcare spending amounting to $4.1 trillion, there is a growing need for such initiatives.

data.title: Engrain and Venn Close the Longest Open Loop in Leasing: Data Loss from Search to Application
data.description: Engrain, a top provider of map-based data visualization for rental housing, recently announced a new integration that links SightMap® data with Venn's leasing, screening, and move-in processes. This integration aims to tackle the issue of data loss that has been causing operators missed conversion opportunities for more than ten years. Set in motion on April 2, 2026, in Denver, this initiative is poised to significantly enhance the overall efficiency and effectiveness of operations in the rental housing sector.

data.title: Mill Creek Announces New Retail Tenants at Modera Riverview
data.description: Indaco, a popular Italian restaurant, is set to become a part of LEGACY, a mixed-use community in Nashville, Tennessee. This announcement was made by Mill Creek Residential on April 2, 2026. Mill Creek Residential is known for its expertise in developing, owning, and managing rental properties in the United States. This addition of Indaco is part of the expansion that will bring two new retailers into the community.

data.title: Phemex Publishes April 2026 Proof of Reserves, Reporting 131% Total Reserve Ratio
data.description: In Apia, Samoa on April 2, 2026, Phemex, a crypto exchange prioritizing user experience, unveiled its April 2026 Proof of Reserves (PoR). This release emphasizes Phemex's dedication to transparency, asset support, and safeguarding user funds. The report affirms that all user balances are entirely....

data.title: Inc. Names CFO Worx to Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Southeast
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, CFO Worx has secured the 19th spot on the highly coveted Inc. Regionals: Southeast list. This list showcases the quickest-growing privately owned companies in the Southeastern region, which encompasses South Carolina, Kentucky, Tennessee, Georgia, Arkansas, Alabama, Mississippi, Louisiana, Florida, and Puerto Rico. The ranking is part of Inc.'s sixth annual compilation, recognizing top performers in the business world.

data.title: Vialto Partners bolsters UK immigration practice with addition of seasoned legal team
data.description: Vialto Partners, a top provider of comprehensive global work solutions covering immigration and tax services, is set to welcome a new team from Dentons LLP based in London. This move aims at bolstering Vialto's worldwide immigration expertise and growing its UK operations. The development was revealed on April 2, 2026, marking a significant milestone for Vialto as they strengthen their capabilities.

data.title: Oportun Provides Updates on Leadership Transition
data.description: Kate Layton and Gaurav Rana have been appointed to jointly lead Oportun on an interim basis as the Board of Directors progresses with its search for a new CEO. Kate Layton and Gaurav Rana will assume leadership roles during this transitional period.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 2, 2026
data.description: Before the market opens, Pharvaris (NASDAQ: PHVS) is predicted to announce its fourth quarter earnings. Lindsay (NYSE: LNN) is expected to report earnings of $1.65 per share with revenue around $168.66 million. AirSculpt Technologies (NASDAQ: AIRS) is anticipated to disclose a quarterly loss of $0.02 per share on revenue of $34.56 million. Cheche Group (NASDAQ: CCG) is also expected to report its earnings before the bell. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
